title: Backend Developer Vacancy at HCL Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at HCL Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
HCL Technologies has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Visakhapatnam office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About HCL Technologies:
HCL Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HCL Technologies!
